final.explanation: Final Jeopardy checks whether students can move beyond recall. A strong response names the relevant Statistics and Residuals idea, uses evidence from the prompt or source, and explains the connection in context. That is the common scoring habit across NYS standards-aligned tasks and AP CED-style review.
